steps.title: Use the single-design clue
steps.content: The sentence describes sleek contemporary elements and traditional organic materials appearing together in a single design. The blank needs a noun for combining different elements into one unified whole.

steps.title: Match the combination word
steps.content:
• Choice A: Means a label or naming, not combination.
  • Choice B: Means examination, not joining materials.
  • Choice C: Means spreading out, not unifying.
  • Choice D: Means combining parts into a whole, matching the design trend.
The answer is D.
